findings.title: Customer review delete not transactional
findings.issue: remove() deletes the review then recalculates aggregates in separate operations. Admin service correctly uses $transaction.
findings.impact: Low — customer deletes are infrequent; aggregates self-correct on next admin action.

findings.title: userHasReviewed check only scans current page
findings.issue: userHasReviewed checks only the current page of reviews. If user's review is on another page, the form still shows.
findings.suggestion: Add a dedicated canReview API call or check via summary endpoint.
findings.impact: Low — backend enforces unique constraint via 409 ConflictException.
